title: Format Employee Names
scenario: Format the following employee names into a standard 'Last Name, First Name' format: John Smith, Jane Doe, Emma Johnson. The output should be a list of formatted names.
constraints: Must be under 100 characters per name

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if each formatted name meets the character and case constraints.
Verify if each name is in the correct 'Last Name, First Name' format.
